hero.subtitle: AI-powered mind mapping that understands your ideas, suggests connections, and helps you learn faster.

ai_expansion.title: AI-Powered Expansion
ai_expansion.description: Select any node and let AI suggest related concepts, definitions, and connections. Supports OpenAI, Claude, and local models.

infinite_canvas.title: Infinite Canvas
infinite_canvas.description: Pan, zoom, and navigate freely. Force-directed layouts keep your maps organized. Minimap for orientation in large maps.

cross_platform.title: Web, Desktop, Mobile
cross_platform.description: Use the web app anywhere, install the desktop app via Tauri, or take it on the go with iOS and Android via Capacitor.

realtime_sync.title: Real-time Sync
realtime_sync.description: Conflict-free sync powered by Yjs. Your maps stay consistent across all devices, even offline. Auto-save included.

semantic_engine.title: Semantic Engine
semantic_engine.description: Embedding-based similarity search discovers hidden connections. Semantic clustering reveals patterns in your thinking.

export.title: Export Anywhere
export.description: Export as PNG for presentations, JSON for data portability, or Markdown for clean hierarchical outlines.

cta.heading: Ready to think differently?
cta.subtitle: Free, open-source, and built for students. Available on every platform you use.
